_contextSnippet: Copy number alterations were inferred using TITAN with the patient's peripheral blood DNA serving as a normal control. No copy number alterations were found in the plexiform neurofibroma (ring a, Figure 1C), but the pre-treatment MPNST demonstrated chromosomal amplifications (orange regions) on chromosomes 1, 7, and 8
details: Successfully inferred copy number alterations using patient's peripheral blood DNA as normal control, identified chromosomal amplifications on chromosomes 1, 7, and 8 in pre-treatment MPNST
